title: oxconf
description: Configuration file for oxctl (YAML, filename: oxconf, no extension)

image.description: Full container image URI including tag (e.g. 123456789.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/app:abc123)

container-name.description: Name of the container inside the task definition to update with the new image

task-def.description: Path to the ECS task definition JSON template file

wait.description: Whether to wait for the ECS service to reach a stable state after deployment

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for the stability wait (used only when wait=true)
